title: Assertion failure in ./kernel/rtlil.h:1277
body:
The code

```
module top(input in,output out);
  SB_DFF dff(out,in,1);
endmodule
```

when compiled with the command line

```
yosys -p 'synth_ice40 -top top -blif test.blif' test.v
```

gives the assertion failure

```
ERROR: Assert `sig.size() == 1 && sig.chunks().size() == 1' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:1277
```

rather than an error message. If "1" is replaced by "1'b1" the module compiles successfully.
